001/*

003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.TypeCategory.*;
023
024import java.lang.reflect.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.function.*;
027import java.util.regex.*;
028
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
038
039/**
040 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link JsonSchemaSerializer}.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
044 * </ul>
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
047 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JsonSchemaDetails">JSON-Schema Support</a>
048 * </ul>
049 */
050@SuppressWarnings({
051   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
052})
053public class JsonSchemaGeneratorSession extends MarshallingTraverseSession {
054
055   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
056   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
057   private static final String ARG_id = "id";
058   private static final String ARG_def = "def";
059
060   // JSON Schema property name constants
061   private static final String PROP_additionalProperties = "additionalProperties";
062   private static final String PROP_enum = "enum";
063   private static final String PROP_format = "format";
064   private static final String PROP_items = "items";
065   private static final String PROP_properties = "properties";
066   private static final String PROP_type = "type";
067   private static final String PROP_uniqueItems = "uniqueItems";
068
069   // JSON Schema type and format constants
070   private static final String TYPE_string = "string";
071   private static final String FORMAT_uri = "uri";
072
073   /**
074    * Builder class.
075    */
076   public static class Builder extends MarshallingTraverseSession.Builder<Builder> {
077
078      private JsonSchemaGenerator ctx;
079
080      /**
081       * Constructor
082       *
083       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
084       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
085       */
086      protected Builder(JsonSchemaGenerator ctx) {
087         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
088         this.ctx = ctx;
089      }
090
091      @Override
092      public JsonSchemaGeneratorSession build() {
093         return new JsonSchemaGeneratorSession(this);
094      }
095
096   }
097
098   /**
099    * Creates a new builder for this object.
100    *
101    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
102    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
103    * @return A new builder.
104    */
105   public static Builder create(JsonSchemaGenerator ctx) {
106      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
107   }
108
109   private final JsonSchemaGenerator ctx;
110   private final Map<String,JsonMap> defs;
111   private JsonParserSession jpSession;
112   private JsonSerializerSession jsSession;
113
114   /**
115    * Constructor.
116    *
117    * @param builder The builder for this object.
118    */
119   protected JsonSchemaGeneratorSession(Builder builder) {
120      super(builder);
121      ctx = builder.ctx;
122      defs = isUseBeanDefs() ? new TreeMap<>() : null;
123   }
124
125   /**
126    * Adds a schema definition to this session.
127    *
128    * @param id The definition ID.
129    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
130    * @param def The definition schema.
131    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
132    * @return This object.
133    */
134   public JsonSchemaGeneratorSession addBeanDef(String id, JsonMap def) {
135      if (nn(defs))
136         defs.put(assertArgNotNull(ARG_id, id), assertArgNotNull(ARG_def, def));
137      return this;
138   }
139
140   /**
141    * Returns the definition ID for the specified class.
142    *
143    * @param cm The class to get the definition ID of.
144    * @return The definition ID for the specified class.
145    */
146   public String getBeanDefId(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
147      return getBeanDefMapper().getId(cm);
148   }
149
150   /**
151    * Returns the definitions that were gathered during this session.
152    *
153    * <p>
154    * This map is modifiable and affects the map in the session.
155    *
156    * @return
157    *    The definitions that were gathered during this session, or <jk>null</jk> if {@link JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#useBeanDefs()} was not enabled.
158    */
159   public Map<String,JsonMap> getBeanDefs() { return defs; }
160
161   /**
162    * Returns the definition URI for the specified class.
163    *
164    * @param cm The class to get the definition URI of.
165    * @return The definition URI for the specified class.
166    */
167   public java.net.URI getBeanDefUri(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
168      return getBeanDefMapper().getURI(cm);
169   }
170
171   /**
172    * Returns the definition URI for the specified class.
173    *
174    * @param id The definition ID to get the definition URI of.
175    * @return The definition URI for the specified class.
176    */
177   public java.net.URI getBeanDefUri(String id) {
178      return getBeanDefMapper().getURI(id);
179   }
180
181   /**
182    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
183    *
184    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
185    * @return The metadata.
186    */
187   public JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta getJsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
188      return ctx.getJsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
189   }
190
191   /**
192    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
193    *
194    * @param cm The class to return the metadata on.
195    * @return The metadata.
196    */
197   public JsonSchemaClassMeta getJsonSchemaClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
198      return ctx.getJsonSchemaClassMeta(cm);
199   }
200
201   /**
202    * Returns the JSON-schema for the specified type.
203    *
204    * @param cm The object type.
205    * @return The schema for the type.
206    * @throws MarshallingRecursionException Bean recursion occurred.
207    * @throws SerializeException Error occurred.
208    */
209   public JsonMap getSchema(ClassMeta<?> cm) throws MarshallingRecursionException, SerializeException {
210      return getSchema(cm, "root", false, false, null);
211   }
212
213   /**
214    * Returns the JSON-schema for the specified object.
215    *
216    * @param o
217    *    The object.
218    *    <br>Can either be a POJO or a <c>Class</c>/<c>Type</c>.
219    * @return The schema for the type.
220    * @throws MarshallingRecursionException Bean recursion occurred.
221    * @throws SerializeException Error occurred.
222    */
223   public JsonMap getSchema(Object o) throws MarshallingRecursionException, SerializeException {
224      return getSchema(toClassMeta(o), "root", false, false, null);
225   }
226
227   /**
228    * Returns the JSON-schema for the specified type.
229    *
230    * @param type The object type.
231    * @return The schema for the type.
232    * @throws MarshallingRecursionException Bean recursion occurred.
233    * @throws SerializeException Error occurred.
234    */
235   public JsonMap getSchema(Type type) throws MarshallingRecursionException, SerializeException {
236      return getSchema(getClassMeta(type), "root", false, false, null);
237   }
238
239   private Object getDescription(ClassMeta<?> sType, TypeCategory t, boolean descriptionAdded) {
240      var canAdd = isAllowNestedDescriptions() || ! descriptionAdded;
241      if (canAdd && (getAddDescriptionsTo().contains(t) || getAddDescriptionsTo().contains(ANY)))
242         return sType.toString();
243      return null;
244   }
245
246   @SuppressWarnings({
247      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast to List<String> for enum extraction
248   })
249   private static List<String> getEnums(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
250      List<String> l = list();
251      for (var e : ((Class<Enum<?>>)cm.inner()).getEnumConstants())
252         l.add(cm.toString(e));
253      return l;
254   }
255
256   private Object getExample(ClassMeta<?> sType, TypeCategory t, boolean exampleAdded) throws SerializeException {
257      var canAdd = isAllowNestedExamples() || ! exampleAdded;
258      if (canAdd && (getAddExamplesTo().contains(t) || getAddExamplesTo().contains(ANY))) {
259         var example = sType.getExample(this, jpSession());
260         if (nn(example)) {
261            try {
262               return Json5Parser.DEFAULT.parse(toJson(example), Object.class);
263            } catch (ParseException e) {
264               throw new SerializeException(e);
265            }
266         }
267      }
268      return null;
269   }
270
271   @SuppressWarnings({
272      "java:S1168",  // Intentional null when type is ignored — signals "no schema" to callers; null is filtered by JsonMap serialization
273      "java:S3776",  // Cognitive complexity acceptable for schema generation over type categories
274      "java:S6541",  // Brain Method — unified getSchema branching over serializers/types is intentional
275      "rawtypes",    // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
276      "unchecked"    // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
277   })
278   private JsonMap getSchema(ClassMeta<?> eType, String attrName, boolean exampleAdded, boolean descriptionAdded, JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta jsbpm)
279      throws MarshallingRecursionException, SerializeException {
280
281      if (ctx.isIgnoredType(eType))
282         return null;
283
284      var out = new JsonMap();
285
286      if (eType == null)
287         eType = object();
288
289      ClassMeta<?> aType = null;       // The actual type (will be null if recursion occurs)
290      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;       // The serialized type
291      var objectSwap = eType.getSwap(this);
292
293      aType = push(attrName, eType, null);
294
295      sType = eType.getSerializedClassMeta(this);
296
297      String type = null;
298      String format = null;
299      Object example = null;
300      Object description = null;
301
302      boolean useDef = isUseBeanDefs() && sType.isBean();
303
304      if (useDef) {
305         exampleAdded = false;
306         descriptionAdded = false;
307      }
308
309      if (useDef && defs.containsKey(getBeanDefId(sType))) {
310         pop();
311         return new JsonMap().append("$ref", getBeanDefUri(sType));
312      }
313
314      JsonSchemaClassMeta jscm = null;
315      var objectSwapCM = objectSwap == null ? null : getClassMeta(objectSwap.getClass());
316      if (nn(objectSwapCM) && getAnnotationProvider().has(Schema.class, objectSwapCM))
317         jscm = getJsonSchemaClassMeta(objectSwapCM);
318      if (jscm == null)
319         jscm = getJsonSchemaClassMeta(sType);
320
321      TypeCategory tc = null;
322
323      if (sType.isNumber()) {
324         tc = NUMBER;
325         if (sType.isDecimal()) {
326            type = "number";
327            if (sType.isFloat()) {
328               format = "float";
329            } else if (sType.isDouble()) {
330               format = "double";
331            }
332         } else {
333            type = "integer";
334            if (sType.isShort()) {
335               format = "int16";
336            } else if (sType.isInteger()) {
337               format = "int32";
338            } else if (sType.isLong()) {
339               format = "int64";
340            }
341         }
342      } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
343         tc = BOOLEAN;
344         type = "boolean";
345      } else if (sType.isMap()) {
346         tc = MAP;
347         type = "object";
348      } else if (sType.isBean()) {
349         tc = BEAN;
350         type = "object";
351      } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
352         tc = COLLECTION;
353         type = "array";
354      } else if (sType.isArray()) {
355         tc = ARRAY;
356         type = "array";
357      } else if (sType.isEnum()) {
358         tc = ENUM;
359         type = TYPE_string;
360      } else {
361         tc = STRING;
362         type = TYPE_string;
363         if (sType.isUri())
364            format = FORMAT_uri;
365      }
366
367      // Add info from @Schema on bean property.
368      if (nn(jsbpm)) {
369         out.append(jsbpm.getSchema());
370      }
371
372      out.append(jscm.getSchema());
373
374      Predicate<String> ne = Utils::ne;
375      out.appendIfAbsentIf(ne, PROP_type, type);
376      out.appendIfAbsentIf(ne, PROP_format, format);
377
378      if (nn(aType)) {
379
380         example = getExample(sType, tc, exampleAdded);
381         description = getDescription(sType, tc, descriptionAdded);
382         exampleAdded |= nn(example);
383         descriptionAdded |= nn(description);
384
385         if (tc == BEAN) {
386            var properties = new JsonMap();
387            BeanMeta bm = getBeanMeta(sType.inner());
388            for (Iterator<BeanPropertyMeta> i = bm.getProperties().values().iterator(); i.hasNext();) {
389               BeanPropertyMeta p = i.next();
390               if (p.canRead())
391                  properties.put(p.getName(), getSchema((ClassMeta<?>) p.getBeanInfo(), p.getName(), exampleAdded, descriptionAdded, getJsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta(p)));
392            }
393            out.put(PROP_properties, properties);
394
395         } else if (tc == COLLECTION) {
396            ClassMeta et = sType.getElementType();
397            if (sType.isCollection() && sType.isAssignableTo(Set.class))
398               out.put(PROP_uniqueItems, true);
399            out.put(PROP_items, getSchema(et, PROP_items, exampleAdded, descriptionAdded, null));
400
401         } else if (tc == ARRAY) {
402            ClassMeta et = sType.getElementType();
403            if (sType.isCollection() && sType.isAssignableTo(Set.class))
404               out.put(PROP_uniqueItems, true);
405            out.put(PROP_items, getSchema(et, PROP_items, exampleAdded, descriptionAdded, null));
406
407         } else if (tc == ENUM) {
408            out.put(PROP_enum, getEnums(sType));
409
410         } else if (tc == MAP) {
411            var om = getSchema(sType.getValueType(), PROP_additionalProperties, exampleAdded, descriptionAdded, null);
412            if (om != null && ! om.isEmpty())
413               out.put(PROP_additionalProperties, om);
414
415         }
416      }
417
418      out.append(jscm.getSchema());
419
420      Predicate<Object> neo = Utils::ne;
421      out.appendIfAbsentIf(neo, "description", description);
422      out.appendIfAbsentIf(neo, "example", example);
423
424      if (useDef) {
425         defs.put(getBeanDefId(sType), out);
426         out = JsonMap.of("$ref", getBeanDefUri(sType));
427      }
428
429      pop();
430
431      return out;
432   }
433
434   private JsonParserSession jpSession() {
435      if (jpSession == null)
436         jpSession = ctx.getJsonParser().getSession();
437      return jpSession;
438   }
439
440   private ClassMeta<?> toClassMeta(Object o) {
441      if (o instanceof Type o2)
442         return getClassMeta(o2);
443      return getClassMetaForObject(o);
444   }
445
446   private String toJson(Object o) throws SerializeException {
447      if (jsSession == null)
448         jsSession = ctx.getJsonSerializer().getSession();
449      return jsSession.serializeToString(o);
450   }
451
452   /**
453    * Add descriptions to types.
454    *
455    * @see JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#addDescriptionsTo(TypeCategory...)
456    * @return
457    *    Set of categories of types that descriptions should be automatically added to generated schemas.
458    */
459   protected final Set<TypeCategory> getAddDescriptionsTo() { return ctx.getAddDescriptionsTo(); }
460
461   /**
462    * Add examples.
463    *
464    * @see JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#addExamplesTo(TypeCategory...)
465    * @return
466    *    Set of categories of types that examples should be automatically added to generated schemas.
467    */
468   protected final Set<TypeCategory> getAddExamplesTo() { return ctx.getAddExamplesTo(); }
469
470   /**
471    * Bean schema definition mapper.
472    *
473    * @see JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#beanDefMapper(Class)
474    * @return
475    *    Interface to use for converting Bean classes to definition IDs and URIs.
476    */
477   protected final MarshallingDefMapper getBeanDefMapper() { return ctx.getBeanDefMapper(); }
478
479   /**
480    * Ignore types from schema definitions.
481    *
482    * @see JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#ignoreTypes(String...)
483    * @return
484    *    Custom schema information for particular class types.
485    */
486   protected final List<Pattern> getIgnoreTypes() { return ctx.getIgnoreTypes(); }
487
488   /**
489    * Allow nested descriptions.
490    *
491    * @see JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#allowNestedDescriptions()
492    * @return
493    *    <jk>true</jk> if nested descriptions are allowed in schema definitions.
494    */
495   protected final boolean isAllowNestedDescriptions() { return ctx.isAllowNestedDescriptions(); }
496
497   /**
498    * Allow nested examples.
499    *
500    * @see JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#allowNestedExamples()
501    * @return
502    *    <jk>true</jk> if nested examples are allowed in schema definitions.
503    */
504   protected final boolean isAllowNestedExamples() { return ctx.isAllowNestedExamples(); }
505
506   /**
507    * Use bean definitions.
508    *
509    * @see JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#useBeanDefs()
510    * @return
511    *    <jk>true</jk> if schemas on beans will be serialized with <js>'$ref'</js> tags.
512    */
513   protected final boolean isUseBeanDefs() { return ctx.isUseBeanDefs(); }
514}
